# Gemini Code Assist \- Security Policies and Best Practices

## Introduction

	This policy outlines the security requirements, best practices and training for using Gemini Code Assist within our company. Gemini Code Assist is an AI-powered tool designed to enhance developer productivity and code quality. Adherence to this policy is mandatory to ensure the security of our intellectual property and systems.  
	Additional resources:

* [Gemini Code Assist \- Installation Guide](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1jN33hzQXeDnWBUf7uPdDsR2ikGhSAUzff4iQ0W5_0CQ/edit?usp=sharing)  
* [Motorola MCP Server \- Configuration Guide](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1B0wyZBLgh819eYDtpV2CssybgPc7gpOB8Q2riUOiohE/edit?usp=sharing)  
* [Gemini Code Assist \- Gemini CLI Extensions](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Ht-0bIFOeXunz4C3OyWu25lTeLfbHBT6GhWuvcmVQas/edit?usp=sharing)  
* [Gemini Code Assist Knowledge Sharing & Office Hours](https://lenovo-my.sharepoint.com/:f:/p/luizfrf/IgBo4RDfwm-vQoFTZfmep6zjAXU3zEW1YVlG63QEKyNsndU)

## Scope

	This policy applies to all employees, contractors, and other personnel who use Gemini Code Assist in their development workflows.

## License Application Process

	The process is simple:

* Read and understand our security policies and best practices (this document)  
* Fill out the application form: [Gemini Code Assist Application Form](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSe5-UODbfD8B0ibya6CrXPLBY-EwNtz0V79_3vkrnpp2tertQ/viewform?usp=dialog)  
* **After that, do not install GCA IDE plugins or Gemini CLI, wait until we contact you by email when your license is assigned**  
* Follow our installation guide for any of the supported IDEs: [Gemini Code Assist \- Installation Guide](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1jN33hzQXeDnWBUf7uPdDsR2ikGhSAUzff4iQ0W5_0CQ/edit?tab=t.0)  
* There are some trainings available at the end of this document, follow the steps in the document to access the trainings

## Security Policies

1. **Data Privacy:**  
   * Do not use Gemini Code Assist for **Individuals**, the only approved version is Gemini for **Business** (Standard or Enterprise) through a **valid license** and the correct Google Cloud Project (**moto-gemini-assist**). In case of questions please contact us.  
   * Please confirm that when your project is developed using Gemini Code Assist, you will not open or edit files containing **passwords**, **secrets** and **other key information**.  
   * Do not input or open any **personally identifiable information (PII)**, **sensitive customer data**, **financial information**, or **other non-code-related confidential information** that is not strictly relevant to the specific code that Gemini is assisting to develop or debug.  
2. **Intellectual Property (IP) Protection:**  
   * Google offers **IP indemnification** for licensed users of Gemini Code Assist, which helps protect the company from potential copyright infringement claims.  
   * For any commit that includes code generated or significantly modified by Gemini Code Assist, the commit message body must include the tag (**Tags: GCA-Assisted**). This provides a searchable audit trail for internal governance and quality control.

## Authorized Use and Phased Rollout

1. Initial rollout of Gemini Code Assist is limited to authorized personnel.  
2. During this initial phase, GCA is approved for use on projects generally accessible to development staff (e.g., projects under home/ that are protected via **Arch-AOSP-Partner-Access-Internal** and **Arch-AOSP-Partner-Early-Access**).  
3. Use of GCA on highly-restricted, IP-sensitive projects (internally designated as "glocu-protected projects") is prohibited until the rollout phase is complete and explicitly approved (Teams that own and manage the protected code must review their NDAs and [GCA Enterprise Terms of Use](https://developers.google.com/gemini-code-assist/resources/privacy-notices), and determine if GCA is safe to use. If it does appear so, then please raise a request for approval to [awheeler@motorola.com](mailto:awheeler@motorola.com)).  
4. If you use Gemini CLI, we have a specific [Policy](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Ht-0bIFOeXunz4C3OyWu25lTeLfbHBT6GhWuvcmVQas/edit?usp=sharing) about extensions.

## Best Practices for Developers

1. **Critical Evaluation of Suggestions (The "Trust but Verify" Mindset):**  
   * Treat all AI-generated code as you would code from an inexperienced developer. Always **review**, **test**, **understand** any code suggested by Gemini Code Assist before integrating it into our codebase. **Verify** that the code does not have **bugs** and **security defects**.  
   * The formal code review process is the official record of diligence and acceptance of all code, regardless of its origin. The developer who commits the code is ultimately responsible for its quality, security, and correctness.  
   * Be aware that AI can "hallucinate" and generate code that appears correct but is functionally flawed. **Always verify** the generated code. Use Gemini Code Assist as a tool to augment your skills, not replace your judgement.  
2. **Effective Prompting:**  
   * Provide **clear**, **specific**, and **detailed** prompts to get the most relevant and accurate responses.  
   * Break down **complex** tasks into **smaller**, more manageable prompts.  
   * Android Prompt Gallery: [https://developer.android.com/studio/prompt-gallery](https://developer.android.com/studio/prompt-gallery)

## Licenses Assignment

* Please confirm that the account can only be used by the owner and must not be lent to others. It can only be used for developing Motorola/Lenovo projects and not for developing non-Motorola/non-Lenovo projects.  
* We have a limited number of seats available, so we will **monitor usage** and **reassign** the licenses of developers who have not used Gemini Code Assist for **30 days**.

## Issues

	If you have issues, please open a CR in Jira under the **AITOOLS** project with the **GCA** component: [Create Support CR](https://idart.mot.com/secure/CreateIssue.jspa?pid=43185&issuetype=10)

## Trainings

* There are some lab trainings that need credit to run, so enter the Motorola organization (make sure to sign in with your Motorola account): [Invitation Link](https://www.skills.google/organizations/motorola-mobility-holdings-llc/invites/Skills-BoostSignup)

![][image1]

* Trainings:  
  * [Streamlining App Development with Gemini Code Assist](https://www.skills.google/course_templates/1166): Introductory training for developers  
  * [Kickstarting Application Development with Gemini Code Assist](https://www.skills.google/course_templates/1399): Labs with GCA usage examples  
  * [Configure Gemini Code Assist for Organizations](https://www.skills.google/course_templates/1402): Training with general information about administering Gemini Code Assist
